## What changed?

Describe the purpose of this pull request in a few lines.

## Why?

Explain why this change is needed.

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:run`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=high`
- [ ] `docker compose --env-file .env.docker.example config`
- [ ] I reviewed the changes locally

## Security

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private credentials, local databases, or `.env` files are committed
- [ ] New environment variables are documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] User data in tests/docs uses safe example values
